data.title: Candesartan Cilexetil Tablets Specified Drug-use Survey "Hypertension: Survey on Patients With Metabolic Syndrome"
data.brief_summary: The purpose of this survey is designed to investigate the treatment status of hypertensive patient with metabolic syndrome-related risk factors treated with candesartan cilexetil tablets (Blopress Tablets), as well as to assess relationships between risk factors (example, visceral fat accumulation) and the incidence of cerebrovascular/cardiovascular events in an exploratory manner.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria: Hypertensive patients with at least one of the following risk factors:

* Waist circumference greater than or equal to (≥) 85 centimeter (cm) for male and ≥ 90 cm for female
* Fasting triglyceride level ≥ 150 milligram per deciliter (mg/dL)
* High-density lipoprotein (HDL) choles
endpoints: Number of Participants Reporting One or More Adverse Drug Reactions (ADR)
Number of Participants Reporting One or More Serious Adverse Drug Reactions (SADR)
